title: Verify @monaco-editor/react is installed in node_modules
body: pnpm typecheck fails on src/dashboard/components/files/{FileDiffViewer,FileEditor,FileViewer}.tsx with TS2307 'Cannot find module @monaco-editor/react'. The package is declared in package.json (^4.7.0) but not installed in this environment. This is pre-existing on HEAD (commit 8b08e494) and not introduced by the merge. Run `pnpm install` in CI/local before typecheck.
rationale: If CI doesn't run pnpm install before tsc, the PR will fail typecheck for reasons unrelated to the merge resolution.
